nodes.label: NON-OBVIOUS RULES — do not break these
nodes.norm_label: non-obvious rules — do not break these

nodes.label: 0. The app is ALWAYS single-column/mobile — never desktop side-by-side
nodes.norm_label: 0. the app is always single-column/mobile — never desktop side-by-side

nodes.label: 2. Must sign every release with the SAME keystore
nodes.norm_label: 2. must sign every release with the same keystore

nodes.label: 3. NEVER push this project's `origin` at the web repo (`tnc-sim`)
nodes.norm_label: 3. never push this project's `origin` at the web repo (`tnc-sim`)

nodes.label: 4. Never commit secrets — check before every commit

nodes.label: 5. `www/index.html` is THE source — edit it directly here

nodes.label: 6. After editing `www/`, remember `npx cap sync android` before building

nodes.label: 7. Keyboard-open detection uses a remembered visualViewport baseline

nodes.label: 8. `APP_VERSION` is a build marker, separate from `versionCode`/`versionName`

nodes.label: 9. `android:windowSoftInputMode="adjustResize"` is required — without it, no JS keyboard fix can work
